headline: Jim Cramer Recommends Vertiv Over Carrier Global
summary: Jim Cramer gave top insight on Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE:CARR), sharing a game plan of what to buy, sell, and hold right now. A caller asked how the company might benefit from the growing demand for “complex cooling solutions” required by the nationwide construction of data centers. Cramer replied: No, you’re not going to, if […]

headline: Shares of data center-related companies are trading higher amid optimism that that Middle East conflict may be resolved sooner. Also, Fed Chair Powell's remarks that inflation is in check are providing support for risk assets.
summary: Shares of data center-related companies are trading higher amid optimism that that Middle East conflict may be resolved sooner. Also, Fed Chair Powell's remarks that inflation is in check are providing support for risk assets.

headline: William Blair Says Watsco (WSO) Sell-Off Overdone Despite New Competition
summary: Watsco, Inc. (NYSE:WSO) is included among the 14 Safest Stocks with Highest Dividends. On March 24, William Blair analyst Ryan Merkel said that shares of Watsco, Inc. (NYSE:WSO) fell 9% after SRS Distribution, part of Home Depot, announced plans to acquire HVAC distributor Mingledorff’s. He pointed to “some negatives” for Watsco, including missing out on […]
